Oh Mighty Grain - macOS (Intel)

INSTALLATION

Copy each plugin bundle to the corresponding folder:

  VST3:  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/
  CLAP:  ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/CLAP/
  AU:    ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/Components/

After copying, restart your DAW. For AU, you may need to run:
  auval -a
to force a rescan.
